bug.description: incorrect flags or bitmask passed to a system or library function

prompt:
There is a incorrect flags or bitmask passed to a system or library function downstream of function e1apCUUP_handle_BEARER_CONTEXT_MODIFICATION_REQUEST in the openair2/E1AP subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/E1AP/e1ap.c:465.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
